title: Citrusy Mussels Tagine
description: A fusion twist on traditional mussels, blending Chinese flavors with the comfort of a tagine. This citrusy and savory dish is sure to delight.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large wok or tagine over medium-high heat.
Add ginger, garlic, and star anise; cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add mussels, citrusy chili sauce, and soy sauce (if using); stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the mussels start to open.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 5-7 minutes, until the mussels are cooked through.
Stir in chopped basil and cook for an additional minute.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.
